hooks.command:
SESSION_JSON=$(cat 2>/dev/null || echo '{}'); SESSION_ID=$(echo "$SESSION_JSON" | jq -r '.session_id // "unknown"' 2>/dev/null || echo "unknown"); GIT_ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) || exit 0; cd "$GIT_ROOT"; PROJ=$(basename "$GIT_ROOT"); TIMESTAMP=$(date "+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M"); WORKLOG_DIR="$GIT_ROOT/.claude/work-logs"; mkdir -p "$WORKLOG_DIR"; COMMITS=$(git log --oneline -10 --since="8 hours ago" 2>/dev/null); [ -z "$COMMITS" ] && exit 0; LOG_FILE="$WORKLOG_DIR/session-log.md"; [ ! -f "$LOG_FILE" ] && printf '# Session Work Log

> Auto-generated. Format: next-milestone skill convention.
> For milestone wrap-ups: /next-milestone

' > "$LOG_FILE"; printf '
---

## %s — %s

**Session:** `%s`

**Commits (last 8h):**
```
%s
```
' "$TIMESTAMP" "$PROJ" "$SESSION_ID" "$COMMITS" >> "$LOG_FILE"
